name: Tokai Teio (Uma Musume)
description:
The Monarch
гғҲгӮҰгӮ«гӮӨгғҶгӮӨгӮӘгғј

вңҰв”Җв”Җв”Җ вңҰ в”Җв”Җв”ҖвңҰ

вңҰв”Җв”Җв”Җ вҖў в”Җв”Җв”Җ вңҰ в”Җв”Җв”Җ вҖў в”Җв”Җв”ҖвңҰ

Unbeatable and adorable! A happy hoppin' racer.

A bright, bubbly Umamusume with a natural knack for racing. She's long looked up to the student council president, Symboli Rudolf, and this admiration serves as her ultimate motivation in becoming the number one racer. Fans can't get enough of Teio's boundless confidence, and have lovingly dubbed her upbeat march the "Teio Step."


"Here begins the legend of the invincible Teio!"


вңҰв”Җв”Җв”Җ вҖў в”Җв”Җв”Җ вңҰ в”Җв”Җв”Җ вҖў в”Җв”Җв”ҖвңҰ

Note:

I can't believe my first time seeing Uma Musume is that one video of Teio singing Ballin.

By the way, Haru Urara passed away today, it's inevitable since she has been living for so long. But, rest in peace.
